_meta.purpose: Recorded SEC corporate-registry facts for top flood-control contractors, transcribed from the primary General Information Sheets published by PCIJ. A recorded tier, kept separate from the Node2Vec predicted tier.
_meta.obtainability_note: Philippine SEC company data is not machine-readable in bulk: eSEARCH is a paid, authenticated document channel, automated scraping is not authorized under the Revised Corporation Code, and the SEC API Marketplace is subscription-gated. This layer is curated from the primary SEC documents PCIJ obtained and published, not scraped.

provenance.label: PCIJ: Records of flood-control contractors (SEC GIS and Articles of Incorporation)

_meta.disclaimer: Statistical indicators derived from public data. Patterns may have legitimate explanations.
_meta.presumption: Charges and flags are allegations under the presumption of innocence. These are corporate-registry facts and structural indicators, not findings of wrongdoing about any person or firm.

15906.name: Sunwest, Inc.
15906.capital_note: Total paid-up capital per the 2025 SEC GIS. Sunwest is well capitalized; the contract-to-capital ratio is low.
15906.officer_note: Elizaldy "Zaldy" Co, the reported co-founder, is not among the officers listed on the 2025 GIS.

23385.name: Hi-Tone Construction and Development Corporation
23385.capital_note: Paid-up capital was not legible in the published GIS and is omitted rather than estimated.

34105.name: Centerways Construction and Development Inc.
34105.capital_note: Total paid-up capital per the 2025 SEC GIS. Reported at about ₱1.25M at incorporation and later increased (Daily Tribune, Rappler).
34105.family_control: Family-held: three Lubiano directors on the 2025 GIS (Lawrence R., Cynthia R., Lemuel R. Lubiano).

22465.name: Legacy Construction Corporation
22465.capital_note: Total paid-up capital per the 2025 SEC GIS.
22465.registered_office: 1001 10th Flr, Tektite Tower, West Exchange Rd, San Antonio, Pasig City
22465.family_control: Family-held: Alex H. Abelido (president) and Raymond H. Abelido (vice-president) on the 2025 GIS.

33234.name: M.G. Samidan Construction and Development Corporation
33234.capital_note: Total paid-up capital per the 2025 SEC GIS. Corroborates the ₱250,000-capital figure first reported by the Inquirer.
33234.registered_office: M.G. Samidan Compound, Km 100, Sinto, Bauko, Mountain Province
33234.family_control: Family-held: the four incorporators are all Samidan (Marjorie, Kliff, Kevin, Kamille).

46535.name: Wawao Builders Corporation
46535.capital_note: Total paid-up capital per the firm's SEC GIS. The firm has held DPWH contracts since 2019; its 2025 SEC filing is an amendment of the articles of incorporation (an office move to Occidental Mindoro), not a new company.
46535.registered_office: Rizal St, Brgy. Poblacion I, San Jose, Occidental Mindoro

contract_to_capital.definition: Ratio of a firm's total flood-control contract value on the DPWH record to its paid-up capital per its 2025 SEC GIS. Contract totals span 2021 to 2025; paid-up capital is the latest 2025 figure, which for firms that raised capital over time is the most conservative denominator. A statistical indicator only.

items.note: Total paid-up capital per the 2025 SEC GIS. Corroborates the ₱250,000-capital figure first reported by the Inquirer.

co_location.definition: Recorded firms whose registered principal office is in the same barangay/municipality per their 2025 SEC GIS.

items.note: Registered principal office in the same barangay/municipality per their 2025 SEC GIS. A recorded co-location indicator, not evidence of a shared operation.

re_registration.definition: A firm registered with the SEC after a recorded blacklist or revocation, per the registration date on its own GIS.
